title: pelargonium caroli-henrici
intro: Pelargonium caroli-henrici is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as the 'Round-leaved Geranium' due to its distinctive rounded leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Pelargonium caroli-henrici include relief from symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
